_comment: PATH A: OpenClaw + FREE google.colab.ai (Gemini) via an OpenAI-compatible shim. No GPU, no model download, no API fee. *** BROWSER/NOTEBOOK ONLY *** google.colab.ai needs the Colab UI to fetch MODEL_PROXY_API_KEY (routes via mp.kaggle.net) — a headless `colab exec` raises TimeoutException('Secrets can only be fetched when running from the Colab UI'). So this backend CANNOT be driven by the bash master (CLI); run it from a browser-run notebook on a CPU runtime instead. TRADE-OFF: inference runs on Google's backend, so prompts leave the sandbox (fee-free but NOT contained). Models from ai.list_models(): google/gemini-2.5-flash | gemini-2.5-pro | gemini-2.0-flash, google/gemma-3-{1b,4b,12b,27b} (no gemini-3.5 exists).
